summary: DHH shares praise from Derek Sivers, who awarded him for 'beautiful coding' based on his work on Instiki, Rails, and Basecamp. DHH credits Ruby as the language that unleashed his creative energy and made programming genuinely fun. He describes Ruby as a language that inspires crafting beautiful, elegant code and recommends it to anyone with even a passing interest in programming.
key_points: Derek Sivers publicly praised DHH's work on Instiki, Rails, and Basecamp as 'absolutely brilliant'
DHH credits Ruby with unleashing creative energy he never expected from programming
Ruby is presented as a language that actively inspires writing beautiful, elegant code
All three major projects (Instiki, Rails, Basecamp) were built in just nine months
money_quotes: I owe much of it to Ruby. It has indeed unleashed an amazing amount of creative energy.
I never, ever thought programming could be this fun, challenging, and capable of teaching me new things daily.
Programming in Ruby inspires you to craft beautiful code. Then mold it further to become more elegant still.
key_insight: Ruby as a programming language doesn't just enable productivity—it actively inspires the crafting of beautiful, elegant code and makes programming genuinely joyful.
